notes:
Welcome to CoreDeck!

Quick reference:
  ↑↓ or ←→  navigate
  Enter       open selected
  Esc         clear / close

AI Brain Layer:
  CoreDeck learns from every action.
  It tracks what you pick for each query
  and boosts those items in future searches.

  ✦ badge = AI predicted for you
  ⚡ badge = trending / used recently

Smart matching:
  Abbreviations work natively:
    'yt'  → YouTube
    'gh'  → GitHub
    'ggl' → Google
    'calc'→ Calculator
    'vsc' → VS Code
  Initials match multi-word names:
    'vsc' matches 'Visual Studio Code'
  Typo tolerance on 4+ char queries

Time-aware suggestions:
  Morning → boosts work/study apps & flows
  Night   → boosts chill/entertainment
  Frequent use → items rank higher
  Recent spike → ⚡ trending badge

Natural language:
  'im bored'         → chill flow
  'start work'       → work flow
  'lets code'        → dev flow
  'study time'       → study flow
  'watch something'  → YouTube

Flow system:
  > flow            list all flows
  > flow add        add from templates
  > flow run <n>    run any flow
  Click 'Flows' in sidebar to manage

GT mode (prefix >):
  > add          add an app via file picker
  > yt <query>   search YouTube
  > g <query>    search Google
  > calc <expr>  evaluate math

Themes: obsidian · frost · ember · void · cyber · yin · steel · gold
Type: theme <n>  to switch
